title: Rename app to AD TRIBE and redesign opening/landing page

requirements.text: Rename the application from 'AdNet Pro' to 'AD TRIBE' across all user-facing text, including the HTML title in index.html, the app name in the header/navigation, the landing page hero section, and any other visible references to the old name.
acceptanceCriteria: The browser tab title reads 'AD TRIBE'
The header/navigation logo or wordmark displays 'AD TRIBE'
No visible references to 'AdNet Pro' remain in the UI

requirements.text: Redesign the opening (landing) page to reflect the 'AD TRIBE' brand identity. The hero section should feature a bold, full-width headline incorporating 'AD TRIBE', a compelling subheadline communicating the platform's value proposition for advertising industry professionals, and a strong call-to-action button. The overall aesthetic should feel energetic yet professional — using warm, rich tones (e.g., deep amber, charcoal, off-white) consistent with the existing sophisticated color palette (avoiding blue and purple). Include a visually striking hero background treatment and reorganize the feature highlights section with updated iconography and copy that reinforces the 'tribe' community concept.
acceptanceCriteria: Landing page hero prominently displays 'AD TRIBE' as the app name
Hero section has a visually impactful background treatment (gradient, texture, or image)
A clear call-to-action button is present and functional for authentication
Feature cards/highlights are updated with copy and icons reflecting community/tribe messaging
Page is fully responsive on mobile and desktop
Color palette avoids blue and purple and feels cohesive with the brand

constraints: Do not change backend logic or data models
Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
Color palette must avoid blue and purple tones
nonGoals: Adding new features or pages beyond the landing page redesign
Changing authentication flow or routing logic
Modifying profile forms or dashboard functionality

required: Bold abstract tribal/geometric pattern hero background with warm amber, charcoal, and gold tones evoking a premium advertising community (ad-tribe-hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)
